title: Ontario Set the World's Largest Human Foosball Record Before the World Cup
script: Ontario set a Guinness World Record this weekend — the largest human foosball game ever played. Dozens of players were attached to poles on a field-sized pitch, limited to sliding only sideways, exactly like the table version. The Ontario Lottery and Gaming Corp organized the event to celebrate the upcoming 2026 FIFA World Cup, which Canada co-hosts starting June 11. The previous record didn't survive the weekend.
